content: Vercel AI SDK generateObject supports enum mode (output:'enum', enum:[...]) which forces the model to return exactly one value from a fixed set — ideal for category classification. For richer output (category + confidence + maybe a 'none/unsure' sentinel), use generateObject with a Zod object schema; the SDK validates output against the schema and throws on a value outside a z.enum, preventing bad categories from leaking through. To handle 'AI unsure / none fits', include a sentinel category (e.g. 'Outros'/null) in the enum plus an optional confidence number, and treat low confidence as 'leave unclassified, user picks'. Enum mode is generateObject-only (short outputs). Use .describe() on the enum to steer the model toward valid category names.
